code: import api from'./api';export const leadService={async createLead(data){const payload={name:data.name,email:data.email,phone:data.phone,company:data.company||null,status:data.status||null,turnover:data.turnover||null};const response=await api.post('/leads',payload);return response.data;},async getLeads(){const response=await api.get('/leads');return response.data;}};export default leadService;
